feed.title: Daily Andy
feed.subtitle: Where shows my vulnerable which isn't even possible to show to my classmates.

entry.title: Fools!
entry.content:
Today is April Fool's Day in China, which is the day can tell lies without any worries. I hate this day, everyone isn't trustable, I always trusts their words and I am always the "Fool".

No more these useless chats, let me tell you a really astonishing new. There are two couples in our class. The first couple is very "brave", they do many things which a couple will do in front of us every day! That makes me very annoyed while the second couple interested me. The boy is one of my best friends, he is a little bit of naive. And the most interesting part of it is that the girl likes my friend, a lot! While my friend don't want to become so "brave" like the first couple do.

I always tries to help them, while he always is so shy, I always push him to the girl.

OK, that's it, that's me, Xenapher, see you next time!

entry.title: Hello Gridea! Hello Github! Hello my blog!
entry.content: Hi everyone my name is Andy and also you can call me my "unofficial" english name Xenapher which pronounces like ks-se-na-fer, and from today, from now on which is 31st March, 2024 CST(UTC + 8:00)，I will begin to write blogs everyday. Hope you'll like it!
